en-US.text: Mark your calendar: the Greater Houston Stamp Show returns September eighteenth through twentieth at the Humble Civic Center — three days you will not want to miss. This is Houston’s gathering place for collectors, dealers, and anyone curious about the stories stamps tell. Walk a full dealer bourse, explore competitive exhibits, catch educational seminars, and stop by the Beginner’s Booth if you are just getting started. And here is what makes this year unforgettable: on Friday at eleven, the United States Postal Service holds a First Day of Issue ceremony for the Winter Wreath Global Forever stamp — a snowy holiday design you can witness at the moment it enters the mailstream. Then bid in the GHSS donation silent auction, anchored by a classic-era highlight: United States Scott number ninety-one, the fifteen-cent Lincoln with E-Grill. Come for the stamps. Stay for an exclusive experience you will only find here. Details and directions are on the flyer — scan the code and join us.

es-US.text: Marque su calendario: el Greater Houston Stamp Show regresa del dieciocho al veinte de septiembre en el Humble Civic Center — tres días que no se puede perder. Este es el punto de encuentro de Houston para coleccionistas, comerciantes y para quienes sienten curiosidad por las historias que cuentan los sellos. Recorra una completa bolsa de comerciantes, explore exhibiciones competitivas, asista a seminarios educativos y visite el Beginner’s Booth si está empezando. Y esto es lo que hace inolvidable este año: el viernes a las once, el Servicio Postal de los Estados Unidos celebra la ceremonia de Primer Día de Emisión del sello Global Forever Winter Wreath — un diseño navideño nevado que usted puede presenciar en el momento en que entra al correo. Luego puje en la subasta silenciosa benéfica de GHSS, con un lote destacado de la era clásica: Estados Unidos Scott número noventa y uno, el Lincoln de quince centavos con E-Grill. Venga por los sellos. Quédese por una experiencia exclusiva que solo encontrará aquí. Los detalles y las indicaciones están en el folleto — escanee el código y únase a nosotros.

heading.text: ✦ USPS FIRST DAY OF ISSUE: Winter Wreath ✦

inlines.text: ✦ USPS FIRST DAY OF ISSUE: Winter Wreath ✦

paragraph.text: A snowy holiday wreath for the season’s Global Forever issue.

children.text: A snowy holiday wreath for the season’s Global Forever issue.

paragraph.text: Photographer Natalia Kostikova built the wreath from artificial branches and craft-store materials, painting each ornament and dusting the greenery with baking soda for frost. Designed by Greg Breeding for the United States Postal Service.

inlines.text: Photographer Natalia Kostikova built the wreath from artificial branches and craft-store materials, painting each ornament and dusting the greenery with baking soda for frost. Designed by Greg Breeding for the United States Postal Service.

paragraph.text: Photo by Natalia Kostikova · Design by Greg Breeding

inlines.text: Photo by Natalia Kostikova · Design by Greg Breeding
